body.body: Decisions: D141-D145. New: D144 traversal-context-design, D145 os-primitives-design. Key changes: UC-004 added to use_cases.md, slate.md updated with Layer 1.5 + OS primitives + index tickets, book_learner wg_cooccur removed, PROC_READING_DEPOSIT deleted, Layer 1 complete. Session theme: Layer 1 substrate complete; reading POC initiated; traversal context + OS primitives designed as Layer 1.5. Subsystems touched: cortex.py, book_learner.py, temporal_gradient.py (new), design_docs/use_cases.md, slate.md.
body.title: day-close for session 2026-03-19d (final)
